name: 折叠刀（★） | 噩梦之夜
descriptionEn: Flip knives sport a Persian-style back-swept blade with an acute point. While the point itself may be fragile, the overall design of the flip knife's design is surprisingly durable. It has individual parts spray-painted solid colors in a night ops color scheme. It's the whisper of the wind... it's the bite at your neck
descriptionZh: 具有波斯风格的折叠刀有着锋利的后弯刀片。虽然刀的尖端较易破碎，但从折叠刀的整体设计来看，它出奇的耐用。 这把武器的部分零件以黑夜行动的配色方案进行了整体喷漆。 疑是清风，却是封喉…
